title: AISMM External Binding
description: Optional metadata object declaring that an AISMM entity or field binds to an external standard from the Meta-Universe External Models Registry. See aismm-external-model-binding.md.

target.description: What is bound: an AISMM entity ID or a field path (e.g. b2.202.data_entity.customer.address).

standard_id.description: The external standard name or acronym as catalogued in the registry.

connector.description: Optional curated connector name from the Meta-Universe Connector Catalogue (MU-V2-ECO-009).

namespace.description: Canonical URI prefix or identifier scheme. Required for `reference` bindings to code/identifier schemes so drift is detectable.

version.description: Pinned version of the external standard.

semantic_package.description: The Semantic Package <name>@<version> this import belongs to (Extension-Model).

fingerprint.description: Optional Meta-Universe Semantic Fingerprint of the imported shape (e.g. sha256:...).

registry_ref.description: Optional pointer into the registry (e.g. ECO-008 row / external-models.csv name).
